title: Exclusive basis
doc_html:
§4251.202. Exclusive basis

            This Part provides the exclusive jurisdictional basis for a court of this state to appoint a guardian or issue a protective order for an adult.

            Acts 2016, No. 333, §1.
doc_text:
§4251.202.  Exclusive basis
This Part provides the exclusive jurisdictional basis for a court of this state to appoint
a guardian or issue a protective order for an adult.
Acts 2016, No. 333, §1.
